feat.name: Wild-haired Fury
feat.text: Your broken bones jut at odd angles, yet this pain only adds to your anger and prowess. You add the combined value of your doomed and wounded conditions as a circumstance bonus to damage rolls with your melee attacks (for example, if you were doomed 1 and wounded 2, you would gain a +3 circumstance bonus to your melee damage rolls).

traits.name: Yaksha
traits.text: Divine spirits who emigrated to Golarion from the first world.
